prompt: Build a continuous improvement loop that tests hypothesis changes against a headless benchmark and only promotes improvements that pass the baseline.
I want to identify workflow friction across sessions, generate improvement hypotheses, test them objectively, and merge only what improves the score.
Set up a meta-learning orchestrator that runs outer/mid/inner loop delegation with headless evaluation gates to autonomously evolve agent instructions.
Run a single research synthesis on the latest TypeScript patterns and summarize the findings.
Send this implementation plan to the red team for adversarial critique before we ship.
Partition this feature work across multiple agents in parallel worktrees and merge when done.
